description: Numerical simulation and scientific computing using SciPy, pyneqsys, pyodesys, and optlang. Covers ODE integration, numerical equation solving, and optimization of system models.
use_cases: Solve a system of ordinary differential equations
Find numerical roots of a nonlinear equation
Simulate a chemical reaction kinetics model
Optimize parameters of a mechanistic model
exclusions: Symbolic integration when exact solution is feasible
example_prompts: Solve dy/dt = -k*y with initial condition y(0) = 1
Find the equilibrium points of the Lotka-Volterra system
Fit a kinetic model to time-series concentration data
